api.invalidTurnEvent: The server sent a damaged turn event
api.requestIdFailed: Could not create a turn identifier
api.turnStreamMissing: The server did not open the turn stream
api.eventAfterTurn: The server sent an event after the turn had finished
api.turnResultUnconfirmed: The server did not confirm the turn result
api.connectionClosedBeforeTurn: The connection closed before the turn was confirmed

notices.turnAlreadyCommitted: The turn had already been saved; its result is now shown.

errors.incompleteChatPayload: The server returned incomplete chat data. Missing: {{fields}}
errors.connectorModelsMismatch: The server returned models for another connector
errors.turnCommittedTranscriptRefresh: The turn finished, but its history could not be refreshed
errors.turnTranscriptRefresh: The turn completed, but its history could not be refreshed
errors.turnChatsRefresh: The turn completed, but the game list could not be refreshed
errors.stopNotConfirmed: The server did not confirm that generation stopped
errors.invalidRewindMessage: This message cannot be used as a rewind point
errors.waitForCurrentAction: Wait for the current action to finish
errors.turnNoLongerEditable: This turn can no longer be changed
errors.historyMutationFailed: The history change was not applied
errors.libraryReveal: Could not open the library folder
errors.connectorCancelNotConfirmed: Cancellation of the {{name}} connection was not confirmed
